description.value:
A nimble, compact bow suited to skirmishers and scouts who need to fire from horseback or tight quarters. Masters of the shortbow develop a fluid rhythm of fire, loosing arrows faster than opponents can respond.

Training Levels

LevelProperties
UntrainedTwo-Handed, Ranged d4 (60/240), Piercing
BasicTwo-Handed, Ranged d6 (80/320), Piercing, Hipshot
MasterTwo-Handed, Ranged d6 (80/320), Piercing, Hipshot, rapid fire
Master PerkAs a bonus action, you may make one attack with this weapon.

rmeData.masterPerk: As a bonus action, you may make one attack with this weapon.
